channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 8ec773c5-7ce6-4b78-91d1-182f8faa536d
Display name: Microsoft Discovery Bookshelf Index Data Reader - Preview
Description: Grants query access to search and retrieve data from Microsoft Discovery Bookshelf knowledge bases. This is the minimum role required to use the retrieve action when linking a knowledge base to an agent. This role is in preview and subject to change.
Link: https://management.azure.com/8ec773c5-7ce6-4b78-91d1-182f8faa536d?api-version=2022-04-01
